display_text: Dragon Knight Aghanim's Scepter: Adds Level 4 Black Dragon Form, providing free pathing, increased damage, and enhanced Wyrm's Wrath attacks. This upgrade counters terrain-dependent strategies by enabling unrestricted movement and siege potential, transforming Dragon Knight into a high-ground siege and teamfight dominator.
search_text: Dragon Knight Aghanim Scepter free pathing siege terrain counter high-ground teamfight dominator

display_text: Dragon Knight Aghanim's Shard: Grants Fireball, an area damage-over-time ability. This upgrade counters clustered positioning and provides lane control, enhancing Dragon Knight's role as a sustained damage dealer and map control specialist.
search_text: Dragon Knight Aghanim Shard Fireball area damage lane control sustained damage positioning counter
